name: Net Interest Margin (NIM)
description: The difference between interest income generated and interest paid to lenders/depositors, relative to the amount of interest-earning assets.

name: Non-Performing Loans (NPL) Ratio
description: The percentage of bank loans that are in default or close to default (typically 90+ days past due).

name: Loan-to-Deposit Ratio (LDR)
description: A core liquidity metric assessing bank stability by dividing total loans by total deposits in the same period.

name: Credit Card Acquisition Cost (CAC)
description: Average total expense incurred to acquire a single active new credit card customer, including advertising, sales overhead, and introductory point rewards.
